description_long: This is a modern sectional couch with a right-hand chaise, upholstered in a dark charcoal fabric. The couch features three large, rectangular back cushions and three seat cushions, all of which appear to be loose and well-padded for comfort. The base of the couch is constructed from a visible wood frame, adding a touch of warmth and contrast to the dark upholstery. The legs are thin, black, and metal, giving the piece a light, elevated appearance and a contemporary feel. The armrests are straight and boxy, matching the overall geometric design of the couch. There are no visible accent pillows or decorative stitching, and the upholstery is solid in color with a matte finish.
description: A modern, dark charcoal sectional couch with a right-hand chaise, wood base, and thin black metal legs. Features three large back cushions, three seat cushions, and straight armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the couch, three back cushions, three seat cushions, and the right-side chaise extension.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the depth of the chaise and the straight, boxy armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the wood base running along the length of the couch.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, showing the chaise extension and the straight armrest on the far end.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and three matching loose back cushions arranged in a linear configuration, with the rightmost section forming a chaise. No accent or throw pillows are visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark charcoal fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed, thin, straight black metal legs of medium height, providing an elevated and modern appearance.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, boxy armrests of medium height, fully upholstered in the same fabric as the rest of the couch, with no visible embellishments.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, divided backrest with three large, loose cushions, each corresponding to a seat section; no tufting or decorative features.
